activities_projects.title: Chapter Summary Writing
activities_projects.objective: Develop the ability to summarize the story
steps: Read the chapter carefully
Identify the important events in Kezia’s life
Write a summary of the story in 8–10 sentences
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and completeness of summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the personality of Kezia and her father
steps: Write points describing Kezia’s character
Write points describing her father’s character
Explain how their relationship changes in the story

activities_projects.title: Event Sequencing Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sequence of events in the story
steps: List important events such as the speech practice, the pin-cushion incident and the nightmare
Arrange them in chronological order
Write one sentence explaining each event

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Builder
steps: Find 8 new words from the chapter
Write their meanings
Use each word in a meaningful sentence

activities_projects.title: Father–Daughter Relationship Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand family relationships in the story
steps: Write how Kezia felt about her father in the beginning
Explain the incident that changed her opinion
Write your thoughts about their relationship
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops understanding of emotions and relationships

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Writing
steps: Imagine a conversation between Kezia and her grandmother
Write at least 8 lines of dialogue
Include discussion about her father
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves creative writing and dialogue skills

activities_projects.title: Theme Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main theme of the story
steps: Think about the importance of understanding parents
Write the main theme of the story in 4–5 sentences
Give examples from the chapter
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands deeper meaning of the story

activities_projects.title: Role Play Activity
steps: Select a scene from the story
Act the roles of Kezia, her father and grandmother
Practice the dialogue with classmates

activities_projects.title: Creative Scene Illustration
steps: Draw the scene where Kezia has a nightmare
Show how her father comforts her
Write a short description of the scene

activities_projects.title: Opinion Writing
activities_projects.objective: Express personal views about the story
steps: Write your opinion about Kezia’s father
Explain whether you think he was strict or caring
Support your ideas with examples from the story
